subject: WM-0184 review: changes_requested
body: High: packages/sim-core/src/owner-autonomy-adoption-closure.test.ts:619-635 does not lock the required exact three-declaration Hauling mapping closure manifest or SHA-256; it only asserts two helpers are present, so an extra allowed free helper would pass. Assert the complete sorted reached set/count and the trailing-newline SHA-256 babcdabd2dcc0998f84968f4959dcab37fede8d1d411d5ebacd1baf663c7deb3, retaining receiver/fake/foreign checks, then rerun focused and constrained quality gates.
